title: Square Map Features V1
description: Square-level structural maps for weak/strong/hole analysis (Structural Cognition Contract v1)

weakForWhite.description: Squares that are weak for White (indexed a1=0 to h8=63)

strongForWhite.description: Squares that are strong for White (indexed a1=0 to h8=63)

weakForBlack.description: Squares that are weak for Black (indexed a1=0 to h8=63)

strongForBlack.description: Squares that are strong for Black (indexed a1=0 to h8=63)

isHoleForWhite.description: Holes (permanent weaknesses) for White (indexed a1=0 to h8=63)

isHoleForBlack.description: Holes (permanent weaknesses) for Black (indexed a1=0 to h8=63)

controlDiffWhite.description: Control differential for White (attackers_white - attackers_black) per square

controlDiffBlack.description: Control differential for Black (attackers_black - attackers_white) per square

pawnContestableWhite.description: Squares that can be contested by White pawns

pawnContestableBlack.description: Squares that can be contested by Black pawns
